//: This tracked manifest deliberately ships empty — no audio files are committed to the repository.
To add your own music, create playlist.local.json (gitignored) beside this file, for example:
Track sources must be filenames relative to this directory or absolute HTTPS streams.
HTTPS streaming contacts the third-party host and exposes ordinary request metadata, including your IP address and browser user agent.
Keys other than 'tracks' are ignored by the loader. See README.md in this directory for the full format.
